title: Protein Expression
author: Rengin Yamur Akbiyik

steps_raw.instruction: Undetermined LB Broth Amresco Catalog #J106-2KG undetermined, LB undetermined, Ampicillin
In this step 35 µl of total sample should be obtained. Binding Buffer involves 5 ml Imidazole, 20 ml TBS, ddw up to 200 ml.
For sonication, plastic test tubes are usually used for sonication. This sonication process is done at 3 cycles for 7 minutes. 00:07:00, Sonication for 1 cycle. Repeat this step for 3 times total.
